zh.lifeSummary: 當Christiana Ledet於大約1199年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登時，她的父親Wischard Ledet37歲，母親Margaret Foliot32歲。她於大約1217年與Henry de Braybrooke在英國英格蘭貝德福爾笛卡爾 瓦登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1271年9月8日在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 哈波洛享年73歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾布申亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christiana Ledet于大约1199年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登时，她的父亲Wischard Ledet37岁，母亲Margaret Foliot32岁。她于大约1217年与Henry de Braybrooke在英国英格兰貝德福爾笛卡爾 瓦登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1271年9月8日在英国萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 哈波洛享年73岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾布申亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Ledet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Emile, Leonce, Angelle, Antoine, Aurelie, Camille, Etienne, Ferrel, Gillis, Gisele.

French: variant of Ledé, from le dé, meaning either ‘the thimble’ or ‘the die’, hence used as a metonymic occupational name for a stitcher or tailor, or as a nickname for a gambler. Compare Leday 1 and Ledee 2.

History: Antoine Livaudais Ledet from La Rochelle in Charente-Maritime, France, married first Marguerite Willig in Edgard, LA, in 1788, and second Victoire-Françoise Quimine in Plattenville, LA, in 1797.

variants.name: Ledee
meanings: French (Ledée and Lédée): variant of Ledé (see Ledet ). This surname is also found in the West Indies, including Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Leday
meanings: Americanized form of French   Ledet  . This surname is found mainly in LA and TX, and is borne mainly by African Americans. Compare   Lada   5.
In some cases possibly also French: variant, with fused masculine definite article le, of Day , a habitatonal name from Day in the Ardennes.

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Christiana Ledet was born about 1199, in Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Wischard Ledet, was 37 and her mother, Margaret Foliot, was 32. She married Henry de Braybrooke about 1217, in Old Warden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 8 September 1271, in Market Harborough, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Bushmead, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christiana Ledet est née environ 1199, à Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Wischard Ledet, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Foliot, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Braybrooke environ 1217, à Old Warden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 septembre 1271, à Market Harborough, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Bushmead, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christiana Ledet um 1199 in Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wischard Ledet 37 und ihre Mutter Margaret Foliot 32. Sie hat um 1217 in Old Warden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Henry de Braybrooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. September 1271 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Market Harborough, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Bushmead, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Henry de Braybrooke circa 1217, nel Old Warden, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 settembre 1271, nel Market Harborough, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Bushmead, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Christiana Ledetが約1199年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチップイング ワーデンで生まれた時，父Wischard Ledetは37歳，母Margaret Foliotは32歳であった。約1217年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアオルド ワーデンでHenry de Braybrookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1271年9月8日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ハーボロウで73歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアブシュメアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana Ledet(이)가 대략 1199년 영국 노르섬프토실르 치핀그 워든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wischard Ledet(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Foliot(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 드 워든에서 Henry de Braybrooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 9월 8일 영국 레이스스터실르 마크트 하르버루그h에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 부스h미드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana Ledet nasceu aproximadamente 1199, em Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Wischard Ledet, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Foliot, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Braybrooke aproximadamente 1217, em Old Warden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1271, em Market Harborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Bushmead, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christiana Ledet родилась около 1199 г. в местности чиппинг варден, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Wischard Ledet было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Foliot, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Braybrooke около 1217 г. в местности олд варден, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 сентября 1271 г. в местности маркет харбороую, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности бушмид, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Englan: Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christiana Ledet nació aproximadamente 1199, en Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Wischard Ledet, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Margaret Foliot, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Henry de Braybrooke aproximadamente 1217, en Old Warden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1271, en Market Harborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Bushmead, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
